name: FileScopeMCP
description: MCP server for file hierarchy and dependency tracking

scripts.build: esbuild src/config-utils.ts src/coordinator.ts src/file-utils.ts src/file-watcher.ts src/global-state.ts src/logger.ts src/mcp-server.ts src/storage-utils.ts src/types.ts src/db/schema.ts src/db/db.ts src/db/repository.ts src/migrate/json-to-sqlite.ts src/change-detector/types.ts src/change-detector/ast-parser.ts src/change-detector/semantic-diff.ts src/change-detector/change-detector.ts src/change-detector/llm-diff-fallback.ts src/change-detector/git-diff.ts --format=esm --target=es2020 --outdir=dist --platform=node
